dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: NOTICED THAT HE WAS SPEAKING TO ME SO INFORMALLY.

dialogue.speaker: MR. PARK
dialogue.line: He's been living abroad and unfamiliar with Korean culture. Please be generous with any misunderstandings that might arise, as he absolutely does not have any bad intentions.

dialogue.speaker: MR. PARK
dialogue.line: There's that favor Chairman asked me of me personally, and I didn't even catch it in the first place, so I can't be harsh on him.

dialogue.speaker: MR. PARK
dialogue.line: He probably didn't know since he's from another country.

dialogue.speaker: MR. PARK
dialogue.line: I think it is a misunderstanding that anyone who is new to our culture would make.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Wow~ Shinwoo! Oooh~ Shinwoo!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Taking that into consideration... I think 5 seconds of your legendary armbar should suffice. Your guillotine isn't bad either.

dialogue.speaker: SHINWOO
dialogue.line: I knew it.

dialogue.speaker: MR. PARK
dialogue.line: Serious, Shinwoo.

dialogue.speaker: SHINWOO
dialogue.line: Sir?

dialogue.speaker: MR. PARK
dialogue.line: You will take it for him.

dialogue.speaker: SHINWOO
dialogue.line: I would very much like to use those techniques on you.

dialogue.speaker: MR. PARK
dialogue.line: In Korea, we use honorifics and formal speech to show respect. This applies in various situations. I won't go into the details right now for the sake of time, but for now, just know that this applies for people who are older than you.

dialogue.speaker: MR. PARK
dialogue.line: People who are older than you.

dialogue.speaker: MR. PARK
dialogue.line: Seeing the look on his face, he doesn't get it. Let's let it go this time. I can't get mad when even Shinwoo is being so understanding.

dialogue.speaker: MR. PARK
dialogue.line: We'll discuss this later. I'm sure you are all curious about the transfer student, but save that for after class.

dialogue.speaker: MR. PARK
dialogue.line: You can take the empty seat behind Shinwoo.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Shinwoo was the one who was babbling just now.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: H-Hey, why did Mr. Park have to explain like that? And why did he understand?

dialogue.speaker: MR. PARK
dialogue.line: Let's begin; everyone open your books.

dialogue.speaker: MR. PARK
dialogue.line: Hm, why are you guys sitting like that?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: The transfer student didn't bring his books, so we are sharing, sir.

dialogue.speaker: MR. PARK
dialogue.line: I see; but why are there three of you?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: I didn't bring my textbook either, sir.

summary: Mr. Park explains the new transfer student's informal speech due to unfamiliarity with Korean culture, while students joke about Shinwoo's fighting skills. Later, Mr. Park begins class and questions why three students are sharing books, discovering one student also forgot their textbook.
